name: merge-to-main-gate
description: Verifies a completed milestone's already-integrated work is ready to be promoted to main and emits a PASS/WARN/FAIL promotion-readiness verdict plus merge_gate.* signals.
when_to_use: Invoked by the campaign executor at a milestone/wave boundary (per the cadence advisor) to gate promoting accumulated, audited integration-branch work to main — never per-cycle.
